chunks.title: Divine Instruction to Moses
chunks.reason: Yahweh gives specific marching orders and reveals His purpose for hardening Pharaoh's heart.

chunks.title: Pharaoh's Pursuit and Israel's Fear
chunks.reason: Narrative of Pharaoh changing his mind, chasing the people, and the Israelites' complaint to Moses.

chunks.title: Moses Encourages the People
chunks.reason: Moses delivers a direct exhortation to stand firm and witness Yahweh's salvation.

chunks.title: Divine Command and Cloud Movement
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses to split the sea while the angel and cloud pillar shift positions.

chunks.title: Crossing the Sea and Egyptian Confusion
chunks.reason: The sea parts for Israel while Yahweh confuses the Egyptian army during the night watch.

chunks.title: Destruction of the Army and Victory
chunks.reason: The waters return to destroy the Egyptians as Israel witnesses Yahweh's great hand.
